pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh line 74: doc.save(output_path) where output_path='/home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_draft.docx'
Task description line 5 and verifier.py line 52: metadata.get('output_path', '/home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_final.docx')
setup_task.sh line 29: doc.add_paragraph('Meridian Property Group, LLC')
setup_task.sh line 42: 'Re: Notice of HVAC System Replacement — Building Common Areas and Tenant Suites, Phase 2'
setup_task.sh lines 45 and 60: contracts with Dominion Mechanical Services and cc line

Web search verification: All three are real, standard fonts. Liberation Serif is metrically compatible with Times New Roman (https://github.com/liberationfonts/liberation-fonts). Tinos is a metrically-compatible substitute for Times New Roman (https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Tinos). These match verifier.py ACCEPTED_FONTS.
Task description line 1: 'Set ALL text in the document to Liberation Serif (or Times New Roman) at 12pt'. Verifier checks for 12pt with tolerance 11.5-12.5 (line 148).
Task description line 2: 'Set all four page margins (top, bottom, left, right) to 1.0 inch'. Setup creates 1.25 inch margins intentionally (setup_task.sh lines 69-72) for agent to correct.
Task description line 6: 'Add 12pt of space after each body paragraph'. Verifier checks for 12pt spacing (line 225) with tolerance 2pt.

privileged_info_summary: Business letter formatting task uses a synthetically-created tenant notification document about HVAC system replacement. The document contains a fictional business letter from 'Meridian Property Group, LLC' to 'Ms. Catherine Delacroix' at 'Belvedere Commercial Interiors, Inc.' regarding an HVAC system replacement project. The signer is 'Jonathan R. Whitfield'. All key phrases (Meridian Property Group, HVAC System Replacement, Dominion Mechanical Services, Ms. Delacroix, Jonathan R. Whitfield) are verifiably present in the document. Target formatting specifications are verified: Liberation Serif, Times New Roman, or Tinos font at 12pt; 1.0-inch margins on all four sides; 12pt spacing after body paragraphs. Document paths are /home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_draft.docx (input) and /home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_final.docx (output). All metadata claims are accurate.
